    labelWe are under attack!: Part 1 (0-0)
    titleWe are under attack!: Part 1
    typekill
    nextMissionV2UJlyuXREuiq7PgD5gb7Q

    dropeEX38mtoyku1erVFRU9jng
    keyqDgXhMMZXUma7BljqEvl0w
    descriptionOperative Smith: We are under attack! Last week ships from an unidentified race appeared just outside of here. At first they didn’t attack us. But unfortunately some overeager adventures attacked them… Now they are back… and in force this time… it seems like this new species have declared war on us. They have somehow opened up a black hole right next to our base and enemies are streaming into the system. Please help defend New Erath from the coming onslaught! Countless lives depend upon you!
    value100
    minLvl0
    maxLvl0
    tableMissionTypes
    availableYes
    addedEnemies["xfcZfxryH0CJLAnu1bxGew","-589OCvQ70qwsMDONpTM4A","3SiiPTLKwkelOarBb3etTw","ULhM2gNoYEaVWIdZ9UMvng"]
    completeDescriptionOperative Smith: Excellent work there! You’re getting quite proficient at this killing business... However, it doesn't seem to be enough to stop them. Their ranks are refilling too quickly. We have identified an enemy commander, whom we believe is in charge of the invading force. Take him out and maybe they will pull back...
    majorTypestatic

    Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
